system.description: Nobody deserves to languish in obscurity. Hand someone supplies to create art and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Cause a target to express themself through art

outcomes.success:
they produce a completed work of art in seconds (a statue, a painting, a book, a song, etc.) that ineffably, completely, and undeniably communicates a detailed impression of their inner character.

Anyone who experiences the work will immediately gain a working understanding of the target: a corrupt security guard’s shady dealings are made clear, but so are their debts; an altruistic teen’s pure intentions are on display; a cheating partner’s infidelity is undeniable. By the next morning, if the work remains, it no longer emanates this powerful impression.
outcomes.eachplus3:
choose one:
  • The work goes over one target’s head: they engage with the completed artwork purely on a surface level.
  • The work becomes a phenomenon, and the target immediately develops a small but passionate fan base.
  • Everything else the target ever makes produces the same impression as the work.
  • The piece also communicates the target’s most selfish act, most selfless act, greatest shame, proudest moment, greatest enemy, or closest friend. Your choice.
outcomes.failure: the work communicates your most selfish act and greatest shame instead. It cannot be destroyed.
